item.title: Version 2026.02.26
item.description:
What's New in 2026.02.26

  • Time Saved tracker — see how much time you've saved by dictating instead of typing, displayed in an Apple Health-style bar chart accessible from the dropdown menu
  • "Time Saved" menu item shows your all-time savings at a glance; click to open the chart window
  • Weekly and monthly bar chart views with orange bars, period picker (W/M), and stat cards (Today / This Week / All Time)
  • Daily word counts stored locally in UserDefaults — zero network calls, fully private
  • Tracks both batch and streaming transcription word counts

All transcription happens 100% locally on your device.
